response.justification: Candidate has strong individual-contributor experience (13+ years) across diverse stacks and some teaching/workshop activity demonstrating leadership traits, but the resume shows no formal people-management experience, no team-lead title, and no evidence of building developer tools, build systems, or test infrastructure at the scale required. The role demands 2+ years people management and 3+ years building developer tools — neither is substantiated. Mobile-platform ecosystem experience is also minimal (brief iOS/Apple TV stint in 2015-2016).
strengths: 13+ years of polyglot software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and backend systems
Demonstrated mentorship/teaching via workshops, dojos, and a multi-module Selenium course
Open-source tooling authorship (Trial test runner, Fluent-Asserts) shows developer-tools instinct
concerns: No formal people-management or team-lead role listed — fails the 2-year management minimum
Lacks substantive experience building build systems, compilers, or large-scale test infrastructure
Limited mobile-platform ecosystem depth; role-title inconsistencies on resume (e.g., 'Founder, Amazon') raise credibility questions

key_factors.factor: Strong polyglot IC depth and OSS tooling work
